channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in TypeScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in TypeScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🟦 garrytan/gstack (67476 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: garrytan

📝 Repository: garrytan/gstack

📄 Descrizione: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

⭐ Stelle: 67476

🍴 Forks: 9334

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-11T21:22:45Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-09T04:28:19Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📄 Descrizione: 原汁原昧 Claude Code 可运行,可构建, 可调试版; Typescript 类型全修复; 企业级可靠性; 安全无毒, lock 文件保真, 可直接 bun i; bun run dev 启动

item.title: 🟦 jackwener/OpenCLI (14764 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jackwener

📝 Repository: jackwener/OpenCLI

📄 Descrizione: Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.

⭐ Stelle: 14764

🍴 Forks: 1389

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent ai-agents ai-tools cli

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-10T04:42:42Z

]]>

item.title: 🟦 Lum1104/Understand-Anything (8204 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Lum1104

📝 Repository: Lum1104/Understand-Anything

📄 Descrizione: Turn any code, or knowledge base (Karpathy LLM wiki), into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

⭐ Stelle: 8204

🍴 Forks: 682

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

item.description:
👤 Owner: nirholas

📝 Repository: nirholas/claude-code

item.description:
👤 Owner: JackChen-me

📝 Repository: JackChen-me/open-multi-agent

📄 Descrizione: TypeScript multi-agent orchestration engine — one runTeam() call from goal to result. Multi-model teams, auto task decomposition, parallel execution. 3 runtime dependencies.

item.title: 🟦 ponponon/claude_code_src (2175 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ponponon

📝 Repository: ponponon/claude_code_src

📄 Descrizione: 2026.3.31 claude code 意外把包含源码的文件上传到 npm 仓库，版本号是 2.1.88，其中 cli.js.map 文件有 57MB 的体积，claude code 的源码在该文件的 sourcesContent 字段里面，解压还原后有 70w 行代码

item.title: 🟦 nashsu/llm_wiki (1867 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nashsu

📝 Repository: nashsu/llm_wiki

📄 Descrizione: LLM Wiki is a cross-platform desktop application that turns your documents into an organized, interlinked knowledge base — automatically. Instead of traditional RAG (retrieve-and-answer from scratch every time), the LLM incrementally builds and maintains a persistent wiki from your sources。

⭐ Stelle: 1867

🍴 Forks: 218

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

📜 Licenza: Other

item.title: 🟦 tanbiralam/claude-code (1484 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tanbiralam

📝 Repository: tanbiralam/claude-code

📄 Descrizione: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands. All original source code is the property of Anthropic.

⭐ Stelle: 1484

🍴 Forks: 2363

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: claude-code claude-code-source-code
